ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* Date when the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID to track managers by department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday or special event */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, state, store-specific) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* A numeric value indicating the expected impact on sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, analyst, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical access level (e.g., 1 for store manager, 2 for analyst, 3 for executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
